message:
fix(atc): clamp tail_count to valid index range in AgentRhythm

The tail estimation logic computed tail_count as (len / 5).max(3), which
can exceed the vector's valid index range when the sorted intervals
vector has 4 or fewer elements (e.g., len=4 gives tail_count=3, but
max valid index is 3, and sorted[3] is the last element — however with
len=3, max(3) yields 3 which is out of bounds). Adding .min(sorted.len() - 1)
prevents an index-out-of-bounds panic on small interval windows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
